prestazioni: Engine swap to a Saab B234R (2.3L 16V turbo, 200hp stock) with forged internals: Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 CR), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Saab Performance Parts (SPP) for 300+ hp reliability on E85.

Custom turbo setup: Garrett GT2860RS-5 hybrid turbo (60mm compressor, 56mm turbine) with a Saab 9-5 Aero TD04-15T compressor housing modified for 3-inch V-band inlet, paired with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe and a GReddy Type-S blow-off valve (BOV).

Fuel and ignition system: Bosch Motorsport 0280158046 850cc/min injectors, Walbro 450LPH in-tank fuel pump, AEM 320LPH external lift pump, and a standalone Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom 24-tooth trigger wheel for precise ignition timing (12° base, 28° max advance) and boost control (22 psi peak).
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using Saab 9-3 Viggen fenders (flared 2.5 inches front, 3 inches rear) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Rocket Bunny (Saab 92001-specific kit, part #RB-SAAB-92001-MC).

Custom front splitter and rear diffuser by Saab Design Studio (SDS), fabricated from 3K twill carbon fiber with integrated canards (front) and a 3-piece adjustable gurney flap (rear) for downforce tuning.

OEM+ restomod interior: Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats (Saab 92001-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in Alcantara with red stitching, MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (350mm, suede), and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, 6-point, bolt-in) with integrated harness bar for Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses.
